description.en: Yield a burst of responses no more than interval seconds apart (expressed as an int or float). This generator is an alternative to iterating one response at a time, intended to aid in efficient batch processing. It retrieves the next response along with any immediately available subsequent responses. (For example, a rapid series of EXPUNGE responses after a bulk delete.) Requires a socket connection; does not work on IMAP4_stream connections. >>> with M.idle() as idler: ... # get a response a...
